sectionTagline: Verified research, real deliverables, honest flags. Patience pays. 🦞

marketPulse.note: Point-in-time figures, verified mid-July 2026. Crypto chips refresh live from CoinGecko when you press Refresh; everything else is dated snapshot data — treat it as context, not a quote feed.

items.label: Gold spot
items.context: Record ~$5,602 on Jan 28, 2026, then pulled back. Historically elevated and volatile.

items.label: Silver
items.context: Nominal record $121.67/oz Jan 29, 2026; gold/silver ratio ~50 in early 2026.

items.label: Bitcoin
items.context: Mid-July 2026; ATH $126,198 on Oct 6, 2025. 2026 has been a crypto-winter year with a June–July rebound.

items.label: Ethereum
items.context: Mid-July 2026; ATH $4,953 Aug 24, 2025. Leading the recovery narrative.

items.label: Cards/TCG
items.context: +32% YoY (GemRate). Pokémon led with 16.1M; sports grading fell 12%. Modern sealed softened.

works.title: DIY Outdoor/Home Sustainability & Savings
works.blurb: The Self-Maintaining Property: a Northwest Arkansas blueprint for eco-resilient home systems on a $2,000 phased budget. Zone 7a Ozark specifics, solar + DIY biogas + Stirling integration, chickens and permaculture, Arkansas Act 278 and the expired §25D credit, safety protocols, and local NWA resources.

works.title: Overall Alternative Investments
works.blurb: Two ranked lists of alternative-investment platforms — realized (not advertised) returns, fees, liquidity, solvency risk, and a local-NWA alternative for every platform, benchmarked against VOO / QQQ / SCHD.
flags: Sector honesty flag: fractional platforms showed real 2025–26 stress — Fundrise gated Equity-REIT redemptions (Oct 1, 2025), Masterworks' administrator cash fell to $3.5M with a founder-trust loan, Rally's FY2025 filing carries a going-concern qualification, Yieldstreet suspended redemptions. Verify current status before allocating.

works.title: (AltInv) Valuable Coin Collection
works.blurb: Numismatics as an alternative investment for Northwest Arkansas: the November 2025 penny discontinuation, honest ROI (Lombra ~11%/yr on MS65 vs PCGS3000 ~1.11%/yr since 2000), grading economics and the 3× rule, NWA dealer map, Arkansas's zero sales/cap-gains tax edge on bullion, and a four-tier acquisition plan — plus the working acquisition workbook.
flags: Bifurcated market: the broad PCGS3000 index sits ~45% below its 1989 peak while true rarities set records (Heritage FUN Jan 2026 ≈ $63.4M total). Generic coins mostly track metal content; elevated gold/silver supports that floor.

works.title: Las Vegas — Casino & Gambling Strategy
works.blurb: A two-volume set: a 43-page academic research paper (127 sources) on casino mathematics, game theory, and gambling psychology, and a felt-green-and-gold field guide — the beatable three, full basic-strategy charts, bankroll architecture with stop-loss discipline, comps, and how not to get backed off.
flags: EV honesty: stopping rules can't change expected value — they reshape the outcome distribution and cut total action. Context: 2025 Vegas visitation fell ~7.5% while Strip gaming revenue held ~$8.8B; the house's economics stayed strong even as crowds thinned.

works.title: (AltInv) Card Collecting Guide
works.blurb: The complete 2026 field guide plus a five-workbook toolkit: release calendar through 2029, ROI ranker, Japanese-parallel tracker, sealed-product coverage, and a trophy/vintage tier list.
flags: 2025 was a record grading year (26.8M cards, +32% YoY; PSA ~72% share) and Pokémon's 30th anniversary is driving 2026 demand — but 6M new PSA-10 Pokémon slabs in 2025 pressure modern scarcity. Japanese exclusives strongest; modern sealed/singles softened.

works.title: (AltInv) Local Community Market
works.blurb: The Northwest Arkansas Belonging Guide: a field manual for living local in the Ozarks — where good people gather, where your dollars stay home, and how to become a regular (not a tourist) across Fayetteville, Springdale, Rogers, Bentonville, and the two-hour world around them.

works.title: SaaS Master Investment Portfolio
works.blurb: Master portfolio construction for SaaS-sector investing — being implemented inside Flock Finance, the blockchain-powered decentralized exchange concept for tokenized multi-investment vehicles.

works.title: Insurance, Credit & Loan Comparisons
works.blurb: Policy and benefits comparisons across insurance products, credit lines, and loan structures — publishing after verification passes.

works.title: Wyndham Presidential Timeshare Negotiation
works.blurb: Negotiation playbook for Wyndham points and presidential-tier timeshares (plus the Wii Sports Resorts angle).
flags: Resale reality check baked in: Wyndham points and timeshares routinely resell for ~$1 or free (TUG give-aways of 900K+ point packages); resale points lose VIP status. Wyndham's own 'Certified Exit' deed-back is the legitimate off-ramp — beware upfront-fee exit scams.

works.title: Garcia Trust & Family LLC — Real Estate Holdings
works.blurb: Rental property management with DIY maintenance systems and tax strategies, built on 15+ years of hands-on family real-estate operations in a market where Benton County averages $471K (+8.8% YoY, Arvest Skyline H1 2025).
flags: Methodology flag: the Skyline Report publishes county averages (not medians) twice a year; Redfin's NWA median ran ~$356K in early 2025. Different sources, different math — both are cited with dates when this publishes.
